message:
beads sync: register bd-qk5kv (Fix btrfs zero-range allocation preservation)

Single new bead added in the JSONL state:

bd-qk5kv — Fix btrfs zero-range allocation preservation
  type: bug, priority: 1, status: in_progress
  scope: btrfs zero_range fallocate must preserve prealloc allocation
    shape end-to-end (prealloc extent stays prealloc; logically
    contiguous prealloc rewrite segments must coalesce into a single
    record rather than fragment into multiple adjacent ones).

br sync --flush-only style commit; no other beads touched.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
